                        overflow: hidden;
                        line-height: 35px;

                        background-size: 200% 100%;
                        animation: shine 3s linear infinite;
                    }

                    .scrolling-wrapper {
                        display: flex;
                        width: max-content;
                        position: absolute;
                        animation: scrollInfinite 12s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1) infinite;
                    }

                    .scrolling-text {
                        white-space: nowrap;
                        padding-right: 50px;
                        font-size: 15px;
                        color: #00e673;

                        opacity: 0;
                        animation: fadeInMove 2s ease-out forwards, bounce 1.5s ease-in-out infinite alternate;
                        text-transform: uppercase;
                        letter-spacing: 1px;
                    }

                        0% {
                            background-position: 200% 0;
                        }

                        100% {
                            background-position: -200% 0;
                        }
                    }

                        0% {
                            opacity: 0;
                            transform: translateX(50px);
                        }

                        100% {
                            opacity: 1;
                            transform: translateX(0);
                        }
                    }

                        0% {
                            transform: translateX(0);

                        100% {
                            transform: translateX(-50%);
                        }

                            transform: translateY(0);

                                    <style>
                                        @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Orbitron:wght@400;700;900&display=swap');

                                        .container {
                                            width: 100%;
                                        }

                                        .section-title {
                                            font-family: 'Orbitron', sans-serif;
                                            color: #00e673;
                                            font-size: 22px;
                                            font-weight: 900;
                                            margin-bottom: 20px;
                                            border-bottom: 2px solid transparent;
                                            border-image: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #00c853, transparent) 1;
                                            padding-bottom: 12px;
                                            text-align: center;
                                            text-transform: uppercase;
                                            letter-spacing: 1.5px;
                                            text-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(0, 200, 83, 0.8);
                                        }

                                        .review-box {
                                            display: flex;
                                            gap: 16px;
                                            background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(5, 20, 12, 0.8), rgba(10, 30, 20, 0.6));
                                            border: 1px solid #00c853;
                                            border-radius: 8px;

                                            margin-bottom: 16px;

                                            box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6), inset 0 0 10px rgba(0, 200, 83, 0.1);
                                            position: relative;
                                            overflow: hidden;
                                        }

                                            content: '';
                                            position: absolute;
                                            left: 0;

                        online terbaik, fair, dan menguntungkan. Sebagai <a href="https://techtiksgroup.com/contact/"

                        menghadirkan teknologi terkini, koleksi game terlengkap, serta fitur inovatif yang membuat momen
                        bermain Anda semakin seru dan menguntungkan. Komitmen kami menjaga kualitas permainan, keamanan,
                        dan kepuasan member menjadi alasan utama kenapa Lawu88slot semakin dipercaya dan viral sepanjang
                        tahun 2026.
                    </p>

                        menarik seperti bonus new member, free spin harian, dan promo deposit. Sistem kami sudah
                        dioptimalkan agar ringan dan nyaman digunakan di HP maupun desktop. Dengan tampilan yang clean
                        dan proses login yang cepat, Anda bisa langsung memulai petualangan gaming tanpa ribet.

                        menyajikan koleksi game dengan grafis premium, efek suara memukau, dan fitur bonus yang seru.

                        teknologi canggih dan peluang menang yang fair membuat Lawu88slot menjadi tren gaming populer
                        sejak rilis besar-besaran di tahun 2026.

                        kami siap membantu mulai dari panduan deposit, cara bermain, hingga penyelesaian kendala teknis.
                        Dengan respon yang cepat dan ramah, segala masalah Anda akan terselesaikan dengan mudah sehingga
                        Anda bisa fokus menikmati permainan.
                    </p>

                <script>
                    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',
                        function () {
                            const faqItems = document.querySelectorAll('.faq-item');
                            faqItems.forEach(item => {
                                const question = item.querySelector('.faq-question');
                                question.addEventListener('click',
                                    () => {
                                        const isActive = item.classList.contains('active');
                                        faqItems.forEach(otherItem => { otherItem.classList.remove('active') });
                                        if (!isActive) { item.classList.add('active') }
                                    })
                            })
                        });
                </script>

                        @keyframes cyber-blink {

                            0%,

                                opacity: 1;
                                box-shadow: 0 0 10px #00c853;
                            }

                                opacity: 0.6;
                                box-shadow: 0 0 2px #00c853;
                            }

                            margin-top: 25px;

                            border: 1px solid #00c853;
                            box-shadow: inset 0 0 30px rgba(0, 200, 83, 0.2);
                            /* Grid cyber futuristik */
                            background-image:
                                linear-gradient(rgba(0, 200, 83, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px),
                                linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(0, 200, 83, 0.1) 1px, transparent 1px);
                            background-size: 15px 15px;
                        }

                        .reels {
                            display: flex;
                            justify-content: center;
                            gap: 15px;
                            margin-bottom: 20px;
                        }

                        .reel {
                            width: 85px;
                            height: 85px;
                            background: rgba(5, 20, 12, 0.9);
                            border: 2px solid #00e673;
                            border-radius: 6px;
                            display: flex;
                            align-items: center;
                            justify-content: center;
                            font-size: 42px;
                            box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(0, 230, 115, 0.4), inset 0 0 15px rgba(0, 200, 83, 0.3);
                            position: relative;
                        }

                        /* Aksen siku ala UI game sci-fi */
                        .reel::after {
                            content: '';
                            position: absolute;
                            width: 10px;
                            height: 10px;
                            border-bottom: 2px solid #00ff99;
                            border-right: 2px solid #00ff99;
                            bottom: -2px;
                            right: -2px;
                        }

                        .reel::before {
                            content: '';
                            position: absolute;
                            width: 10px;
                            height: 10px;
                            border-top: 2px solid #00ff99;
                            border-left: 2px solid #00ff99;
                            top: -2px;
                            left: -2px;
                        }

                        .result-box {
                            margin: 15px 0 20px;
                            font-weight: bold;
                            color: #00e673;
                            letter-spacing: 1.5px;
                            font-family: 'Orbitron', sans-serif;
                            font-size: 14px;
                            text-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(0, 230, 115, 0.6);
                            min-height: 20px;
                        }

                        .spin-btn {
                            width: 100%;
                            padding: 16px;
                            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #00b36b, #00e673, #00b36b);
                            background-size: 200% auto;
                            border: 1px solid #00ff99;
                            border-radius: 6px;
                            font-size: 16px;
                            font-weight: 900;
                            font-family: 'Orbitron', sans-serif;
                            color: #000;
                            letter-spacing: 2px;
                            cursor: pointer;
                            box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0, 200, 83, 0.5);
                            transition: 0.3s ease-in-out;
                            text-transform: uppercase;
                        }

                        .spin-btn:hover {
                            background-position: right center;
                            transform: translateY(-2px);
                            box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(0, 230, 115, 0.8);
                            color: #fff;
                        }
                    </style>

                    <script>
                        const symbols = ["💎", "7️⃣", "🔥", "🍒", "⭐", "🛎️", "🎰", "🌟"];

                        function spin() {
                            const r1 = symbols[Math.floor(Math.random() * symbols.length)];
                            const r2 = symbols[Math.floor(Math.random() * symbols.length)];
                            const r3 = symbols[Math.floor(Math.random() * symbols.length)];

                            document.getElementById("reel1").innerText = r1;
                            document.getElementById("reel2").innerText = r2;
                            document.getElementById("reel3").innerText = r3;

                            const result = document.getElementById("resultText");

                            if (r1 === r2 && r2 === r3) {
                                result.innerText = "🔥 JACKPOT! BONUS BESAR MENANTI!";
                                result.style.color = "#00ff99";
                                result.style.textShadow = "0 0 15px #00e673";
                            } else if (r1 === r2 || r2 === r3 || r1 === r3) {
                                result.innerText = "✨ MANTAP! DAPET BONUS FREE SPIN!";
                                result.style.color = "#66ffaa";
                                result.style.textShadow = "0 0 10px #00e673";
                            } else {
                                result.innerText = "COBA LAGI! HOKI MASIH DI DEPAN!";
                                result.style.color = "#00cc77";
                                result.style.textShadow = "0 0 8px #00b36b";
                            }
                        }
                    </script>

                </div>

                <div class="hero-slug">
                    <span class="hero-slug__highlight" style="color:#000000;">

                    </span>
                </div>
        </div>
        </section>
